wall_fidelity.evidence: 35 walls extruded (consensus.walls = 35); shell_stats_from_python.slivers_removed = 0; gates_self_check.plan_shell_group_exists = true; gates_self_check.wall_shell_is_single_group = true. Top render shows continuous L-shaped external shell with no protruding stubs.

door_fidelity.evidence: 7 DoorLeaf_Group in geometry_report (matches consensus.openings kind=interior_door count = 7). All groups have bbox z_min ~ 0 (no floating door). Top render shows door swing arcs at each opening; iso confirms doors anchored to wall hosts.

window_fidelity.evidence: 4 WindowGlass_Group in geometry_report (matches consensus.openings kind=window count = 4); each height_m = 1.2 (in expected range [0.9, 1.5]); peitoril (sill) preserved below and verga (lintel) preserved above per FP-024. Iso render visibly shows partial-height punches in right facade. 1 GlazedBalcony_Group at height 2.7m (full-height porta-vidro, routed correctly via 2D carve path, NOT as window).

room_fidelity.evidence: 8 Floor_Group present vs 11 semantic ambients labelled in planta de vendas. Two cells fuse open-plan ambients with NO wall trace between them in the PDF: r001 = A.S. | TERRACO SOCIAL | TERRACO TECNICO; r002 = SALA DE JANTAR | SALA DE ESTAR. Honest baseline (lessons_learned.md #4); inventing walls to hit 11 cells would violate Hard Rule #1. Labels preserved with `|` separator.

scale_rotation.evidence: Inline review of model_top.png: rectangular footprint axis-aligned; bbox_m matches expected planta_74 size (~17.7m x ~10.5m external envelope per groups_diagnostic[PlanShell_Group].bbox_m). Rotation is canonical (0 deg, no skew). Proportions match planta_74.pdf when overlaid (see artifacts/planta_74/side_by_side_pdf_vs_skp.png from baseline run; this build uses same consensus_sha256 = e1b1a53...).

global_visual.evidence: Inline review of both model_top.png (top-down) and model_iso.png (isometric): no floating geometry, no orphan glass panels, no misplaced soft barriers, no obvious wall stubs, no floor leaks. Openings well-placed; window peitoril/verga visible in iso; soft_barriers visible at parapet height along terrace edges; glazed_balcony tall on west facade. Overall architectural plausibility matches the baseline canonical at artifacts/planta_74/.

review_method.deterministic_heuristics: tools/run_skp_visual_review.py — checks gates_self_check, window count match, floating door, orphan glass, bad window aperture, floor leak. All 6 heuristics returned zero findings on attempt_0.
review_method.qualitative_inline_review: Claude Code 4.7 (1M context) read model_top.png + model_iso.png via Read tool 2026-05-28T03:43Z; promoted global_visual + scale_rotation from auto-WARN to PASS based on inline inspection. No human required for this baseline review.

top_level_verdict_justification: WARN — top-level reflects the known room_fidelity baseline (8 cells vs 11 ambients open-plan). All other axes PASS. Per lessons_learned.md #4, WARN here is acceptable, not blocking. Promotion to PASS would require either: (a) overlay semantic_zones tool splitting fused cells without forging walls, OR (b) human acceptance of merged-cell labelling as final.
